turning_radius.name: Turning Diameter
turning_radius.description: A 1500mm diameter circle must be free of obstructions.

toilet_seat_height.name: Toilet Seat Height
toilet_seat_height.description: The top of the seat must be between 430mm and 485mm from the floor.

door_width.name: Door Clear Width
door_width.description: Minimum clear width is 864mm. Best practice is 915mm.

grab_bar_obstruction.name: Grab Bar Obstruction Check
grab_bar_obstruction.description: Dispensers or bins must not be mounted above or near the grab bar.

ToilerPaper_height.name: Toiler Paper Dispenser Controls Height
ToilerPaper_height.description: Operable parts must be between 380-1220 mm.

dispenser_height.name: Dispenser Controls Height
dispenser_height.description: Operable parts must be between 1120mm and 1220mm.

emergency_button_height.name: Emergency Button Position
emergency_button_height.description: Button must be mounted between 700mm and 1200mm from the floor.
